basic_details.job_title: ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR - National Institute of Health Research (ICMR-NIHR)
basic_details.short_information: ICMR National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR) has released the official Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates not exceeding 35 years of age with a Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology, Psychology, Public Health, Psychiatric Social Work, Social Work, Sociology, Anthropology, Microbiology, or Biochemistry can attend the walk-in interview on 07 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in details are

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per norms for SC/ST, OBC, EWS, Government Employees, Departmental Candidates, Ex-servicemen, and Experienced and skilled persons.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology / Anthropology / Microbiology / Biochemistry.
qualification.details: Project Research Scientis I (Non-Medical): Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology / Anthropology / Microbiology / Biochemistry. Experience: Experience in Public Health / Implementation Research with Publications in Peer-Reviewed Journals.

selection_process: Walk-in-interview / Written Test Skill Test (where applicable)

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICMR-NIHR Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist I Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Research Scientis I (Non-Medical): Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology / Anthropology / Microbiology / Biochemistry. Experience: Experience in Public Health / Implementation Research with Publications in Peer-Reviewed Journals.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per norms for SC/ST, OBC, EWS, Government Employees, Departmental Candidates, Ex-servicemen, and Experienced and skilled persons.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in-interview / Written Test Skill Test (where applicable)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name is Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) for temporary positions at ICMR-NIHR.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What are the required qualifications for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: A postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology / Anthropology / Microbiology / Biochemistry is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 35 years, with relaxations applicable as per norms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 56,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ICMR - National Institute of Health Research, Jodhpur, Rajasthan, 342005.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.
